notes: Android triage requires USB debugging enabled and the device owner / lawful authority's explicit consent. This toolkit does NOT bypass screen lock, root the device, or exploit vulnerabilities.

tools.name: Android Platform Tools (adb, fastboot)
tools.purpose: Official Google ADB / fastboot binaries. Required for any adb-based collection.
tools.notes: ADB is included in the SDK Platform Tools package. Always download from developer.android.com.

tools.name: ALEAPP
tools.purpose: Android Logs Events And Protobuf Parser — parses ADB / filesystem extractions into reports.
tools.notes: Run on the analyst workstation against the collected extraction.

tools.name: DB Browser for SQLite
tools.purpose: View SQLite databases extracted from Android (with authority).
tools.notes: Install on the analyst workstation; do not run on a suspect device.

tools.name: MVT (Mobile Verification Toolkit) — Android
tools.purpose: Consensual forensic analysis of Android devices (mvt-android).
tools.notes: Per Amnesty International Security Lab: use only with explicit consent. Reference docs at docs.mvt.re.
